title: Create SMP by DrCesar
description: A modpack about create to play in multiplayer
body:
## Modpack Overview
- **Centered around the Create mod** and **a LOT** of its add-ons.
- **Cooking & Crafting**: prepare custom recipes with enhanced cooking mechanics.
- **Exploration**: discover brand-new structures, dungeons and even an extra dimension.
- **Factory Building**: design and automate gargantuan, kinetic-powered factories.
- **Multiplayer Focus**: built for co-op play with the **WorldHost** mod—gather your friends and dive in!

# This modpack features:
## Core Machinery & Automation
- **Create Mod Suite**: introduces kinetic-powered contraptions, gearboxes, belts, mechanical presses and deployers for building automated factories.
- **Create Add-Ons**: adds jetpacks (*Create Jetpack Curios*), generators (*Create Generators*), motors (*Create Better Motors*), ore doubling (*Create Simple Ore Doubling*), and specialized structures (*Create Structures Arise*, *Create Deep Dark*).

## World & Exploration
- **Biomes & Terrain**: *Terralith* and *TerraBlender* enrich world generation with new biomes, underground layers, and smoother transitions.
- **Caverns & Ruins**: *Deeper and Darker* and *Dungeons Arise & Seven Seas* add massive underground caves, thematic dungeons, and boss arenas.
- **Structure Overhauls**: replaces vanilla temples and mansions (woodland, desert, jungle, ocean monument, ancient city) with detailed, lore-driven variants.

## Tech, Storage & Utility
- **Energy & Processing**: *Petrol’s Parts*, *Connector*, *PuzzlesLib* enable fuel-based machinery and advanced piping networks.
- **Storage Solutions**: *Tom’s Storage*, *ResourcePackOverrides*, *Searchables* for configurable chests, custom racks and in-game file browsing.
- **Inventory & QoL**: *Mouse Tweaks*, *Clumps* (XP orbs), *Corpse* (item recovery), *Chat Heads*, *Fast-IP-Ping* improve multiplayer and UX.

## Aesthetics & UI
- **Visual Polish**: *Rechiseled* & *Chipped* for decorative block variants; *BetterGrassify* for natural transitions; *Pipe Organs* & *Drippy Loading Screen* for ambience.
- **Interface Tweaks**: *Dark Mode Everywhere*, *Jade* (in-game info), *Enchanting Descriptions* enhance readability and style.

## Performance & Stability
- **Optimizations**: *FerriteCore*, *Entity Culling*, *Bad Optimizations*, *AI Improvements* ensure smooth gameplay under heavy mod load.
